title_en: Builders Win, Information Movers Don't: Nikhyl Singhal on the Next Two Years of Product Management
dek_en: In a return appearance on Lenny's Podcast, Nikhyl Singhal — former exec at Meta and Google, ex-CPO at Credit Karma, and convener of the Skip community of heads of product — argues that the product industry is in a renaissance for builders a
title_zh: 建造者的黄金时代:Nikhyl Singhal 谈 AI 时代产品经理的重塑
dek_zh: 在 Lenny's Podcast 最新一期节目中,The Skip 社区创始人、前 Credit Karma CPO、Meta 和 Google 资深产品高管 Nikhyl Singhal 给出了一个不加粉饰的判断:产品行业正在经历一场彻底的洗牌——"信息搬运工"型产品经理将成为恐龙,而热爱亲手建造的人将迎来职业生涯中最快乐的两年。他同时警告,未来 12 到 24 个月将出现大规模的"先裁员、再招聘",一家公司可能裁掉三万人后再招聘八千人,而这八千人将全部是"AI 优先"的
